channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Pratamnak Hill venues
channel.description: Latest gyms, Muay Thai, dive, golf, and sport venues in Pratamnak Hill, Pattaya.

item.title: Pickleball Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya's flagship dedicated pickleball facility on Pratumnak Soi 6. Two full-sized courts, paddles, balls, ball machine, strong lighting, and beginner lessons from an English-speaking licensed coach.

item.title: Muscle Factory Pattaya
item.description: Largest hardcore gym in Pattaya. Multi-floor 3-story Pratamnak bodybuilding institution. Bangkok sister gym. Industrial fans, no AC.

item.title: AF Academy Football School Pattaya
item.description: From age 3 — youngest accepted in Pattaya football. Multi-location. Russian/English/Thai. Indoor + outdoor fields.

item.title: Royal Varuna Yacht Club
item.description: Thailand most prestigious yacht club, founded 60+ years ago. RYA-accredited sailing + powerboating training. World-class regattas (ILCA, OK Dinghy, Optimist, Dart, Hobie, Multihull). Pratamnak Hill clubhouse + pool + boat storage + beach bar.

item.title: Big Buddha Hill (Wat Phra Yai) — Pratamnak Landmark + Stair Climb
item.description: Pattaya iconic 18m golden Buddha at peak of Pratamnak Hill. Free entry. Accessed via 100+ step grand staircase (genuine cardio climb). 360 degree panoramic Pattaya Bay + Jomtien views. Sunrise/sunset photography. Active temple with resident monks. Dress code applies.

item.title: InterContinental Pattaya Resort
item.description: 5-star IHG hilltop resort. 3 outdoor pools incl. 25m lap pool, Amburaya Spa, 24-hour fitness, on-site tennis courts, sea-view Cliff restaurant. Pratamnak Hill — adjacent to Royal Cliff / Fitz Club / Pickleball Pattaya luxury cluster.

item.title: Fitz Club — Racquets, Health & Fitness (Royal Cliff Hotels Group)
item.description: Award-winning luxury sports club: 7 tennis courts, 2 AC squash courts, table tennis, swimming, gym, professional coaching. Premium tier.

item.title: SUN Fitness Pattaya (3 branches)
item.description: 3-branch chain across Pattaya — single membership accesses all. Soi Buakhao + Naklua branches.

item.title: Cross Pattaya Pratamnak (Cloud Club + PLAYROOM)
item.description: Pratamnak Hill hotel fitness club with Cloud Club gym, PLAYROOM kids zone, swimming pool, and day-pass access for non-guests. Walkable to Royal Cliff cluster.

item.title: Manhattan Pattaya (Hotel Gym)
item.description: Manhattan Pattaya hotel gym on Pratamnak / Central Pattaya — fitness equipment, outdoor swimming pool, and day-pass access for non-guests within walking distance of beach.

item.title: Play Padel Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya's first dedicated padel club at Kasetsin Soi 3, Pratumnak — also Thailand's first indoor padel courts with bookable hourly play, equipment rental, and clinics for all levels.

item.title: Pratumnak Fitness Park (Free Outdoor Calisthenics)
item.description: Pattaya FREE outdoor public fitness park. Free weights + machines + cardio + calisthenics. Pratumnak Hill / Buddha Hill setting. Up to 75lb dumbbells.

item.title: Pattaya Public Running Routes & Parks (Beach + Mabprachan + City Parks)
item.description: Free public running guide. Pattaya Beach 5.8km, Jomtien Beach, Mabprachan 4km loop, Pratumnak Park, Nongprue 1km, Chaiyapruek 400m track.
